key.name: icon-position
key.description: Which corner of the window to show the floating icon: 'left' or 'right'.

key.name: keep-visible-when-pinned
key.description: When true, the floating icon stays visible while the window is pinned on top, without requiring mouse proximity.

key.name: persist-without-focus
key.description: When true, the floating icon stays attached to a pinned window even when another window gets focus.
